sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72877" key="o)ktw/phxus" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀκτώ-πηχυς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">υ,</itype> <sense id="n72877.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀκτάπηχυς</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0487.tlg001:212" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">212</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
